name: MoneyGram
description_short: Fort Lauderdale, FL's MoneyGram at 1700 S Federal Hwy offers check cashing and money transfers, open daily 8AM–10PM.
description_long:
MoneyGram's Fort Lauderdale location sits at 1700 S Federal Hwy, a standalone facility serving the South Federal Highway corridor. Open seven days weekly from 8AM to 10PM, it offers convenient access for evening and weekend financial needs in Fort Lauderdale, FL.

This MoneyGram location provides check cashing, domestic and international money transfers, bill payments, and prepaid card reloads. For specific questions about services, transfer fees, or exchange rates, call +1 800-746-7287. Staff can walk you through options and processing times.

Fort Lauderdale residents rely on this location's extended hours for after-work check cashing and same-day international transfers when banks are closed. Bring a valid government-issued ID and recipient details for any transfer. The straightforward service makes it convenient for local and overseas payments.
address: 1700 S Federal Hwy, Fort Lauderdale, FL 33316

company_info.headquarters: 1700 S Federal Hwy, Fort Lauderdale, FL 33316

pros: Extensive physical network with 16+ locations in Fort Lauderdale alone, accessible through partner retailers including CVS, check-cashing stores, and independent agents
Omnichannel service model allowing customers to send money online and pick up in-person, or initiate in-person and have recipient collect funds remotely
Global reach with service in 200+ countries and territories, making international money transfers accessible to immigrant and diaspora communities
Multiple transaction types available at single locations: money transfers, check cashing, money orders, and bill payments under one service brand
Operating hours extend late into evening at many locations (some open until 11:59 PM), providing flexibility for working customers
No requirement for traditional bank account to access services, serving unbanked and underbanked populations
Real-time transaction tracking and management available online for initiated transfers
cons: Fees for transfers (both domestic and international) are typically higher than digital payment apps and traditional banks, reducing net value received by recipients
Exchange rates for international transfers may be less competitive than specialized currency services or direct bank-to-bank transfers
Dependent on agent locations' individual operating hours and policies, creating inconsistency in service availability across network
Limited information provided on website about specific fee structures, requiring customers to contact individual locations for pricing
Competition from lower-cost digital payment platforms (PayPal, Venmo, Wise) and bank transfer services is eroding market share in developed markets
best_for: Immigrants and migrant workers sending remittances to family members in other countries without bank accounts
Unbanked or underbanked individuals who prefer cash-based transactions and in-person service
People needing immediate check cashing without bank account requirements or credit checks
Customers in areas with limited banking infrastructure seeking reliable, established money transfer services
diagnosis: MoneyGram is best for unbanked or underbanked consumers, immigrants sending international remittances, and individuals without traditional bank accounts who need accessible check cashing and money transfer services. The primary caveat is that fees and exchange rates are typically higher than digital alternatives or traditional banks, so cost-conscious consumers should compare options before using the service, particularly for frequent or large-value transfers.
services: Online account management and transfer tracking
Agent location network in retail, check-cashing, pharmacy, and insurance locations
Same-day transfer funding at many locations
meta_description: MoneyGram at 1700 S Federal Hwy, Fort Lauderdale, FL. Check cashing, money transfers, and bill payments daily 8AM–10PM.
